name: IRC_TN_JOB_CERTIFICATIONS_B
description: Table for storing the License & Certification information of the requisition.

columns.Name: TN_JOB_CERTIFICATION_ID
columns.Comments: Primary Key of the table. System generated.

columns.Name: FA_CERTIFICATION_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the Certification ID of the requisition. Derived from IRC_REQUISITIONS_B.PROFILE_ID, HRT_CERTIFICATION_ITEMS_V.CERTIFICATION_ID.

columns.Name: FA_SECTION_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the Section ID of the requisition. Derived from IRC_REQUISITIONS_B.PROFILE_ID, HRT_CERTIFICATION_ITEMS_V.SECTION_ID.

columns.Name: FA_CONTENT_ITEM_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the Content Item ID of the requisition. Derived from IRC_REQUISITIONS_B.PROFILE_ID, HRT_CERTIFICATION_ITEMS_V.CONTENT_ITEM_ID.

columns.Name: FA_CONTENT_ITEM_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the Content Item Code of the requisition. Derived from IRC_REQUISITIONS_B.PROFILE_ID, HRT_CONTENT_ITEMS_VL.CONTENT_ITEM_CODE.

columns.Name: FA_ESTABLISHMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the Establishment ID Code of the requisition. Derived from IRC_REQUISITIONS_B.PROFILE_ID, HRT_CERTIFICATION_ITEMS_V.EDUCATIONAL_ESTABLISHMENT_ID.

columns.Name: FA_ESTABLISHMENT_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the Establishment Code of the requisition. Derived from IRC_REQUISITIONS_B.PROFILE_ID, HRT_ESTABLISHMENTS_CI_V.SCHOOL_CODE.

columns.Name: FA_COUNTRY_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the Country Code of the requisition. Derived from IRC_REQUISITIONS_B.PROFILE_ID, HRT_CERTIFICATION_ITEMS_V.COUNTRY_CODE.

columns.Name: FA_STATE_PROVINCE_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the State Province Code of the requisition. Derived from IRC_REQUISITIONS_B.PROFILE_ID, HRT_CERTIFICATION_ITEMS_V.STATE_PROVINCE_CODE.

columns.Name: REQUIRED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores the Required Flag of the requisition. Derived from IRC_REQUISITIONS_B.PROFILE_ID, HRT_CERTIFICATION_ITEMS_V.REQUIRED_FLAG.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
